name: leancoder
description: A production-ready coding philosophy layer that intercepts prompts, scans workspace context, applies YAGNI/KISS rules, and optimizes diffs.

chatParticipants.name: leancoder
chatParticipants.description: Your Lean Coding assistant. Enforces YAGNI, KISS, DRY, and deletions.

commands.name: lite
commands.description: Enable Lite mode (subtle suggestions, small footprint)

commands.name: full
commands.description: Enable Full mode (default, standard YAGNI/KISS rules)

commands.name: ultra
commands.description: Enable Ultra mode (aggressive deletions, challenges abstractions)

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review the current file for dead code, nesting, and complexity

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Audit the repository for duplicate utilities, large files, and unused dependencies

commands.name: simplify
commands.description: Simplify the code in the current selection or file

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Optimize the selected code for performance, readability, and LOC

commands.name: benchmark
commands.description: Generate lines added/removed, token savings, and cost metrics

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain LeanCoder philosophy and how to simplify your code

leancoder.autoInject.description: Automatically inject LeanCoder guidelines into LLM requests.

leancoder.optimizePrompt.description: Deduplicate, clean, and compress prompts before sending to the model.

leancoder.scanWorkspace.description: Scan active workspace context files (README.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules) for system prompts.

leancoder.analyzeDiff.description: Analyze generated diffs to suggest LOC reduction and reuse of utilities.

leancoder.reuseExisting.description: Prioritize reusing existing workspace functions, helpers, and components.

leancoder.preferStdlib.description: Prefer native standard library solutions over importing third-party dependencies.

leancoder.preferNative.description: Prefer native platform APIs over custom helper wrappers.

leancoder.preferDeletion.description: Prefer code deletions and refactoring to shrink codebase size.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
